feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Web Services
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Web Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Business Parnter Replication 986 - BP update does not trigger replication automatically
entry.content:
In the context of Business Partner replication, we have configured 986 BO and we can replicate BP using it if we work manually with DRFOUT Tcode. But nothing happens automatically when we change BP (update/create). No web service is triggered. We already have Output Mode as Direct Output as shown below.

Any Ideas ?

entry.title: Is there any inbound standard IDoc/Webservice existing in SAP CRM to create interaction record
entry.content: Hi, My requirement is, CPI will send data to CRM system to create an interaction record. For this, Is there any standard IDoc / Webservice existing in SAP CRM .

entry.title: Table:SRT_MMASTER is growing Rapidly in SID:B4P
entry.content:
As We can see that table: SRT_MMASTER is having more then 100 GB of data right now and This table contain the log from Web services.

Job: SAP_SOAP_RUNTIME_MANAGEMENT is running in PRD as per SAP NOTE: 2231932 – ESI – How to schedule the SAP_SOAP_RUNTIME_MANAGEMENT standard background job

On further checking We have found that log will be saved in Table: SRT_MMASTER until 45 days and it will deleted . So, we will have data of 45 days in PRD system. find the configuration Screen shot for same.

Please find the Reference SAP NOTE: 2976543 - SRT* table content cannot be cleaned.



On further checking the table: SRT_MMASTER content, we have found that there are a lot of Status: System errors and has attachments that are bigger in size.

We know these logs are not useful for us and we wanted to delete those logs for a certain period we have tried to delete them, but we cannot delete the consumer log from Table: SRT_MMATER.

Further checking I have found the below SAP NOTE and canceled those errors, but the cancel log has not been deleted from SAP system Quality SAP System by Job: SAP_SOAP_RUNTIME_MANAGEME as we are testing in Quality system system.

2670185 - ESI - SXMB_MONI: Message cannot be deleted from consumer endpoint

entry.title: Compare values in XVBAP and YVBAP
entry.content:
Hi abap experts,

While change the sales order data even if I am not changes any data or some time revert the data XVBAP structure update indictor as U. But when I compare YVBAP and XVBAP field values are same except XVBAP update indicator. So, I am tring to check if any values are different in XVBAP and YVBAP in user exit when XVBAP any record having update indictor as U. How I can compare all values of there 2 internal tables except this update indictor field. because this is only difference observed in both the tables. Some one help me logic to compare both tables.

entry.title: Disable Initial Password Reset in sap
entry.content:
hello dears,

I am trying to cancel the Initial Password Reset in sap

is there any solution to do that

regards
qutaiba frihat

entry.title: Load balancing from SOAP URL
entry.content:
Hi,
We creates SOAP URL from SOA MANAGER, it is triggering 1 specific server due to that facing some SAP slowness in particular server.

Is it possible to call Load balancer message server from SOAP URL?

I found some configuration in SICF but unable to edit .

It is very critical issue .
Kindly share possibilities .

Thanks and regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP import Webservice error
entry.content:
hi experts:

when I import webservices,i get this message.

someone can help me?

Thanks everyone

entry.title: SOA Manager - Distributing Integration Scenarios - Multiple Domain Systems with one central system
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

This question is regarding SOA-Manager integration scenario distribution using one central S/4Hana system to other S/4Hana systems connected as a domain system.

For Ex. I have 5 S4Hana systems in my landscape like system A, system B, system C, system D, system E

Assuming system A is the central S/4Hana system for SOA-Manager,

Can I create integration scenarios between system B and system C and distribute it using central system A ?

Also, what could be the other possible use case and strategy for a central S/4Hana system for SOA-Manager?

Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: SSO Logon using Logon Tickets not working
entry.content:
I have a Custom Java application deployed on a SAP NW JAVA system. It is configured to call web services from ABAP Backend(currently ECC) using SAP Logon tickets passed as Browser cookies. Now I am migrating to a S4 system, have exchanged the certificates, maintain ACL, set up parameters to access logon tickets. But when I try to call web services through the app, its not authenticating me(401 unauthorized). Tried to trace using program SEC_TRACE_ANALYZER and noticed that the request is coming in as Assertion ticket login request instead of Logon Ticket and erroring out without giving me much details. Are there any setting I am missing that forces S4 side to only use ASSERTION TICKETS? SICF node is set to Alternate Login procedure with SAP Logon/Assertion Ticket as the first option, same on both ECC and S4. The error that I get in trace:

*** ERROR => Required recipient information in ticket is missing (see note 1055856). [ssoxxkrn.c 1124]

N {root-id=5240AE9C90A311EEC45B0000005FE0BA}_{conn-id=5775062090A311EEC22D0000005FE0BA}_1

N *** ERROR => dy_signi_ext(): ASSERTION TICKET contains incomplete recipient information. [sign.c 12601]

N dy_signi_ext(): hiding error details (rc=21) as requested

S4 trace:

TTP> ab_HttpCallSignOn

H SignOn SSO2 imported cookie:AjExMDAgAA5wb3J0... (len=474)

H SignOn Client: 110

H SignOn Language:

H SignOn RETURN_CODE

H Logon with assertion ticket

N dy_signi_ext(): ASSERTION TICKET logon (client 110)

On the ECC side when I run traces I get:

HTTP> ab_HttpCallSignOn

H SignOn SSO2 imported cookie:AjExMDAgAA5wb3J0... (len=472)

H SignOn Client: 300

H SignOn Language:

H SignOn RETURN_CODE

H SignOn SSO2 procedure

N dy_signi_ext: LOGON TICKET logon (client 300)

Thanks

RJ

entry.title: SAP web dispatcher to work as a reverse proxy for an external non sap java based application
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We want to use our on premise SAP web dispatcher to work as a reverse proxy for an external non sap java based application.

Can you please guide us how we can configure the same in our dispatcher.

The java based application URL is as below:

-------------------------------------------------------

https://101.53.133.20:8053/v1/sap/contracts/new">https://1XX.5X.1XX.2X:8053/v1/sap/contracts/new

------------------------------------------------------

Please note this application is hosted in public network and our web dispatcher is hosted in private network.

The telnet connection bidirectional is working fine.

Thanks & Regards,

Pratyush Pradhan,

entry.title: Web service development for payment interface connectivity (blowfish encryption)
entry.content:
Hello community,

We encountered an issue, we are requested to send an encrypted string data with blowfish encryption algorithm with a key. Does anybody know how to encrypt data with a key? The program is written in ABAP.

Please respond only regarding Blowfish encryption.

Many thanks and a Happy New Year!

entry.title: How to programatically know if a user is active on a ABAP webdynpro screen?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

    I have a ABAP webdynpro application. A user can open the app in change mode by pressing the edit button on the webdynpro screen. First user1 has opened the app in browser. After few mins user2 also opens the same app . Then I want to know programatically if user1 is already active and editing the ABAP webdynpro screen. How to get this in ABAP webdynpro code? I have tried storing the userid and timestamp in a custom table when a user opens the app in browser. For this i have used hook methid WDDOINIT. In WDDOEXIT i delete this entry from the custom table. However this will not tell me if another user is still active on the app screen. User might open and keep the screen idle for 1 hr or more. Or user might be working on the app screen and suddently has his system crash. The entry for the user will remain in the custom table on sudden system crash because WDDOEXIT will not be called in such a case. I intent is to see if another is still doing changes to the webdynpro app and if yes then do not allow the 2nd user to open the same webdynpro app in change mode. Incase if the 1st user is inactive due to system crash or has just kept the webdynpro idle then close this user session and allow 2nd user to open the webdynpro app in change mode. How can i achieve this?

Thanks & Regards,

Gopa

entry.title: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Details in ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Can anyone help me how to retrieve the authentication data like user name in logical port? In tcode SOAMANAGER > Service Administration > Web Service Configuration then Search by Consumer Proxy then Display. I would like to get the userID in ABAP program. Can someone help me know in what table were they stored?

From my side I have used ST05 to trace the webservice update process. But I couldn't find related data from the table which listed by ST05 like SRT_CFG_DIR, SRT_CFG_CLI_ASGN, SRT_RTC_CFGVAL, SRT_RTC_DATA, etc.....

Is the authentication data not stored in SAP table or it stored as some encrypt  format? I only need to get the Logical Port authentication UserID to generate a report to list it for different configuration connection.

entry.title: Disable web service navigator
entry.content:
Hello,

As part of Vulnerability scan for our systems, we would like to disable the Web Services Navigator service in the ABAP systems. Kindly let us know how to do the steps to disable the same. 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Request to share the steps involved in exporting Web Services
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have a scenario where “Web-Services” are getting wiped out post performing system refresh and we need to manually re-configure the web-services again to regain the functionality.

 

So, we request to kindly share the pre-steps that are involved in taking export of web-services; so that we can re-import the configuration settings / export post completion of refresh activities.

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: webservice system cant change ， system is default
entry.content:
HI，buys，i have a question.

enter CWT , but system is CWP, tks.

entry.title: Error while parsing wsdl
entry.content:
I am going to consume WSDL in SAP system. The web service is  Detecno  CFDI Manager 4.0 (created in other system). But when i go to create logical port for it through SOAMANAGER the system generate a message of error:

The following premises were verified: https://transport-freight-management.docs.developers.aeb.com/docs/s4-hana-erp-connection-trouble-shooting

I would be grateful for any hints.

Regards, Tatsiana

entry.title: SOAMANAGER Webservice - FM is not getting line items in Table Parameter
entry.content:
Hi All

I have created a webservice using SE37 RFC Function Module, having an Import parameter and Tables Parameter.

While passing data from SoapUI, Import Parameter is receiving the values which were passed whereas table parameter is showing the appended line item, but all values/columns of item are initial. Whereas Logs and XML Payload of SOAMANAGER is showing that Table item is having same items which were passed to SAP using SoapUI.

 

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:sap-com:document:sap:soap:functions:mc-style">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<urn:ZfiInterface>
<Check>X</Check>
<ItFile>
<!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
<item>
<BILL_MONTH>202301</BILL_MONTH>
<READ_DATE>20230101</READ_DATE>
<DUE_DATE>20230102</DUE_DATE>
<BATCH>01</BATCH>
<SNO>1</SNO>
</item>
</ItFile>
<ItReturn2>
<!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
<item>
<Type></Type>
<Id></Id>
<Number></Number>
<Message></Message>
<LogNo></LogNo>
<LogMsgNo></LogMsgNo>
<MessageV1></MessageV1>
<MessageV2></MessageV2>
<MessageV3></MessageV3>
<MessageV4></MessageV4>
<Parameter></Parameter>
<Row></Row>
<Field></Field>
<System></System>
</item>
</ItReturn2>
</urn:ZfiInterface>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: Best way to Send Huge volume of data from On premise S/4HANA to non SAP aplicaitons
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to send few of S/4HANA standard table data to non SAP applicaitons for anlaytics purpose on daily basis. We have On premise S/4HANA 2021 version. Which is the best way to send huge data on daily basis to non SAP applications

entry.title: Activation of CREDITMANAGEMENTACCOUNTBYIDQU1 web service
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the standard web service CREDITMANAGEMENTACCOUNTBYIDQU1 which doesn't work on the production environment, I would like to activate it, can you please tell me how?

THANKS
